name: Wave Reader
description: A real-time RSS feed aggregator with AI-powered summaries and a clean reading experience.

name: Pixel Forge
description: Browser-based pixel art editor with layer support, animation timeline, and export to sprite sheets.

name: Drift API
description: A lightweight REST API framework with built-in rate limiting, auth middleware, and auto-generated docs.

name: TerraHex
description: Hex-grid based terrain generator for tabletop RPGs with export to PNG and Roll20 integration.
